title: Fluffy French Toast
description: A classic breakfast dish made with fluffy bread, perfect for a Sunday morning. Serve warm with your favorite toppings.
instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the bread slices on the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown, flip and cook for another 2 minutes.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings, such as maple syrup, fresh fruits, or whipped cream.
Repeat with the remaining bread slices.
